params.TgtPrompt: Select target artifact token you control to copy
params.SpellDescription: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact token you control.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target artifact token you control to copy
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact token you control.

params.Description: If you would create one or more artifact tokens, instead create those tokens plus an additional Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")
